summary: The chapter details the search for a talented video editor for Hyunwoo's gameplay, culminating in the hiring of the acclaimed but expensive Ellis Movies. Hyunwoo acquires and uses a 'Rare Random Skill Book,' gaining the 'Blood for Blood' passive skill. Ellis's first edited video of Hyunwoo, 'Fishing for PK-ers,' achieves massive viral success, attracting over 150,000 views and catching the attention of Nike management. As Hyunwoo continues to level up with his unique pet, Tangtang, they discover a new quest titled 'The Heir of the Meadow Wolf Tribe.'
key_moments: Hyunwoo's team hires the renowned video editor Ellis Movies.
Hyunwoo uses a 'Rare Random Skill Book' and learns the 'Blood for Blood' passive skill.
Ellis's edited video of Hyunwoo, 'Fishing for PK-ers,' goes viral and captures the interest of Nike management.
Hyunwoo and his pet, Tangtang, continue to strengthen and level up.
Hyunwoo receives a new quest: 'The Heir of the Meadow Wolf Tribe.'
